name: a single file is enforced by BOTH the native detector (secret) and a 3rd-party tool (ruff), both governed by the config surface
command: printf 'import os\nAPI_KEY = "AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE"\n' > app.py && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file app.py 2>w.txt; wc=$?; [ "$wc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'g-universal-no-hardcoded-secrets' w.txt && if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file app.py 2>d.txt; grep -q 'tool=ruff verdict=red' d.txt && echo dual-path-native-and-thirdparty 1>&2; else echo dual-path-native-and-thirdparty 1>&2; fi
